prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of furan was calculated using DFT at the **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** level (tier `standard`) in the gas phase, with no solvent model applied. The calculation employed PySCF as the software backend. The input geometry was read from the file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`, containing nine atoms. The SCF procedure for this calculation converged successfully within 9 iterations. The calculated HOMO energy is **−6.3598 eV**, and the LUMO energy is **−0.1024 eV**, giving a HOMO–LUMO gap of **6.2574 eV**. The result is trustworthy as integrity checks reported no issues.
